title: 街のトレンドメーカー♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I have something I want to talk to
you about.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I have something I want to talk to
you about.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, some of the younger students invited me to
go out with them.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They want to go shopping in a fashionable area.
And they're interested in all the latest styles, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But there's something I'm a little bit worried
about...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trends change so fast these days.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying my best to learn, but when I talk to
people...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I sometimes wonder whether people get what I'm
saying. I'm sure that sort of thing happens to you
too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I sometimes wonder whether people get what I'm
saying. I'm sure that sort of thing happens to you
too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It'd make things awkward if I said the wrong thing
while we're all hanging out, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to let everyone down, so please give
me some good ideas of what to do!
choice_data_list: Let's touch up your sense of style.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay. So you and I are going to check out the
latest trends together?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay. So you and I are going to check out the
latest trends together?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I arrive at a very fashionable
shopping area.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer, let's check out the latest
trends!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer, let's check out the latest
trends!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there's a CD store over there. I wonder if we
can listen to some of the latest tunes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky points to a used record shop.
choice_data_list:
I don't think you'll find the most trendy music
there...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? Hmm... I guess that particular place
doesn't deal in the latest music, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, what about that boutique over there! I'm
sensing a stylish aura coming from it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky points to what appears to be a
vintage clothing store.
choice_data_list:
I don't think they'll have the latest fashions at
that place...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Well then, on to the next one...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It's hard to figure out what the latest
trends are. I just can't seem to wrap my head
around it...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My mom told me it's good to stay on top of this
sort of thing, but it's hard...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, my mom is so cheerful and bright. She's
super fun to be around!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She's also very fashionable. I've admired that
about her since I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky lights up when she talks about her
mother.
choice_data_list:
What about telling the younger students what
your mother taught you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah... That might just work.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I could teach them the latest trends that I learned
from my mother.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And rather than blindly chase other people's
trends, we could share our own ideas and make
things more fun! Okay, I'll give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, I went out with the younger students,
and we had a great time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was able to recommend some hip places.
Everyone had a totally fresh experience! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We all agreed to go out again soon. Hehe! I
wonder where we should go next! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's smile tells me that she made some
good memories with the younger students.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You mean I should be more confident in what I
like?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Maybe I am obsessing over this stuff a little too much...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's not like me to feel so insecure.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I have to believe in myself! I'm always at the
forefront of what's hip!
choice_data_list: I think everyone already realizes that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I bet everyone knows about my sense
of style!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm the trendiest Umamusume of them all! As the
youth say, I'm the bomb dot com!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That really got me pumped up! This next outing
with the girls will be off the hook! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I ask Maruzensky how her time with the
younger students went.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I was right to take your advice. I got to
know everyone even better!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We went shopping, had dinner, and went to
karaoke together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I sang a lot of the hit songs that my mom taught
me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They said they had a lot of fun listening to songs
they'd never heard before.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I also learned a lot of new trendy stuff from them.
It was a good experience!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm even trendier, everyone's going to
want to watch me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Charming, with a unique sense of style... That's
Maruzensky in a nutshell.
